story.text:
# 💡 Bilateral Consent
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The Staff Shop's fitting precondition: a Hermes-class fitting binds only when both sides consent — the bearer to carry, the substrate to be carried. Sister concept to Bilateral Witness (the record of agreement); consent is the gate, witness is the receipt.
